summary: اختبار التحسينات المطلوبة: صورة موظف التوصيل، ألوان الأزرار، فلترة الطلبات، ونص 'الطلب جاهز' - تم التحقق من الكود بنجاح
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test orders (TEST_PAID_001, TEST_CONF_002, TEST_PREP_003)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified via code review. Browser automation had login issues but API login works correctly.

pending_orders_filter.details: Orders with status 'pending' are filtered out from seller orders list. Only paid orders and above are shown.

pickup_code_display.details: Pickup code displayed for shipped orders with green background and large digits

driver_image_product_seller.details: Driver image (delivery_driver_image) displayed with 12x12 rounded-full styling and emerald border

driver_image_food_seller.details: Driver image (driver_image) displayed in two places: ready status (line 2257) and out_for_delivery status (line 2320)

driver_photo_customer.details: Driver photo (tracking.delivery_driver.photo) displayed with 16x16 rounded-full styling and orange border

button_text_change.details: Button text changed from 'تم الشحن' to 'الطلب جاهز ✓'

FoodStoreDashboard.js.driver_image: ✅ driver_image field used in lines 2257 and 2320
